name: Kanye West
abstract: Ye ( YAY; born Kanye Omari West  KAHN-yay oh-MAH-ree, June 8, 1977) is an American rapper, songwriter, and record producer. He has been listed among the greatest rappers of all time and referred to as one of the most prominent figures in hip-hop.

about_quotes.speaker: Robert Glasper
about_quotes.evidence: Robert has collaborated with a diverse list of artists including ... Kanye West
about_quotes.doc_title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016
